query:
SELECT 
  policyNumber, 
  ownerName, 
  premium, 
  targetPremium, 
  calculatedCommission, 
  writingAgentLevel, 
  writingAgentSplit,
  status
FROM inforce_policies 
WHERE status = 'Active'
LIMIT 20;
